'''Baros''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Baros system/Legends|Baros system]] in the [[Dominus sector/Legends|Dominus sector]]. An [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] world on the farthest reaches of the [[The Slice/Legends|Slice]], the planet was home to the [[Brubb]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. It had a high [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]], was frequented by windstorms, and possessed infertile growing soil. In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], it was one of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] worlds [[Battle of Baros|taken over]] by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] during his [[Thrawn campaign|campaign]] against the New Republic.

==Description==
Baros was located within a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] [[Baros system/Legends|of the same name]] in the [[Dominus sector/Legends|Dominus sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="TEAoc" /> It was situated at the terminus of [[Prously's Rim Run]], a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] which connected it to [[Dornea/Legends|Dornea]].<ref name="TEA" /> Baros itself was a large [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] around the [[Color/Legends|blue]] [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Bari]]. It was a dry, arid, dusty, and windy world with rocky terrain and heavy [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]], equivalent to 2.9 times the galactic standard. Baros received plentiful solar [[Radiation/Legends|radiation]] but had few organic nutrients, so its [[Plant/Legends|plant]] life, which included the prickly [[Avabush/Legends|avabush]], was sparse and meager. A Barosian [[Standard year/Legends|year]] lasted 567 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|standard]] [[Standard day/Legends|days]].<ref name="GG4" />

==History==
Baros was originally inhabited by herbivorous lizards which evolved into the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Brubb]]s.<ref name="GG4" /> Although the region of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] around Baros was explored between [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]] and [[3000 BBY]],<ref name="TEA" /> Baros itself did not come to the attention of the greater galaxy until the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], when a group of Brubb [[Astronomer/Legends|astronomers]], postulating that their planet was not the only civilized world in the galaxy, began beaming coded messages into space, where they were intercepted by a cargo [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] and reported to the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]], who then dispatched a light [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] to investigate the message's origins.<ref name="GG4" /> In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], on [[Great ReSynchronization|44:7:20]], Baros was [[Battle of Baros|attacked]] by forces of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] during his [[Thrawn campaign|campaign]] against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="TEA" />
